figures.caption: Fig. 1: Use-case scenario based on Frisco, a suburb area in Dallas, Texas, simulated in BlueSky. Merging points WP3 and WP7 and the Intersection WP9 correspond to M1, M2, and IN bottlenecks, respectively.
Fig. 2: Average total rewards gained by both Co. A and Co. B agents with various policy-configuration models.
Fig. 3: (left) Average total reward and (right) number of successful agents with average NMACs per episode for both fleets.
TABLE I: Evaluation results for all policy-configuration combinations. A and B represent Co. A and Co. B, and X and Y are the strong and weak configurations, respectively.
